payload.title: [LOW] JWT lacks aud/iss and access token is not revocable
payload.description: mintAccessToken claims are {sub,tenant_id,role,iat,exp} only; verify enforces none of iss/aud; no jti/denylist so a leaked 15-min access token survives logout. FIX: add+enforce iss/aud; accept the short revocation gap or add a session-version check.
